hooks.command: node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const d=JSON.parse(c.join('')); const fp=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.file_path)||''; if(fp.match(/\.env(\.[a-z]+)?$/i)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'.envへの書き込みは禁止（APIキーを含むため）'})); process.exit(2);} });"

node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const d=JSON.parse(c.join('')); const fp=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.file_path)||''; if(fp.match(/\.(ts|tsx)$/)){const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{const r=execSync('cd /c/Claude-Files/clau-tamina && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck -p tsconfig.web.json 2>&1',{encoding:'utf8'}); if(r.trim()) process.stdout.write(r.slice(-500));}catch(e){process.stdout.write(e.stdout?e.stdout.slice(-500):'TSC error');}} });"
